name: Harnessing LLMs for Reliable Academic Supervision: A Comparative Study

description: arXiv:2607.14707v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language models routinely produce fluent answers to single-shot prompts, yet deploying them as reliable components of a domain decision system is substantially harder. Closing this gap is the work of harness engineering: the deliberate composition of deterministic scaffolding (symbolic filters, retrieval, schema-typed I/O, LLM-as-j...
